title: Setting Up Your First React App
description: Get React running on your machine in minutes.

slides.title: Create React App 🏗️
slides.content:
# The Fastest Way to Start

**Create React App** is an officially supported tool that sets up a modern React development environment with zero configuration.

## Steps

1. Make sure you have **Node.js** installed (version 14 or above).
2. Open your terminal and run:
   ```bash
   npx create-react-app my-first-app
   cd my-first-app
   npm start
   ```
3. Your app will open at `http://localhost:3000`. Any changes you save will automatically reload the page.

That's it! You now have a working React playground.

quizData.question: What command creates a new React app with Create React App?
quizData.explanation: `npx create-react-app my-app` is the correct command. `npx` runs the package without permanently installing it.

slides.title: Common Pitfall ⚠️
slides.content:
## Node.js Version

If you get an error, make sure Node.js is installed and up‑to‑date. Run `node -v` in your terminal to check.
